mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO CodeRelationUpload ( BiggerSerialNumber, BigSerialNumber, MediumSerialNumber, SmallSerialNumber, DxCode, SalesCode, VirtualSerialNumber, IsVirtual, ProductNO, OrderNo, Status, TagNo, Qty, Type, WarehouseNo, BatchNo, AddTime, ErrCount, Msg, UploadTime, IsUpload, IsDel, TeamName ) VALUES
( #{item.biggerSerialNumber}, #{item.bigSerialNumber}, #{item.mediumSerialNumber}, #{item.smallSerialNumber}, #{item.dxCode}, #{item.salesCode}, #{item.virtualSerialNumber}, #{item.isVirtual}, #{item.productNo}, #{item.orderNo}, #{item.status}, #{item.tagNo}, #{item.qty}, #{item.type}, #{item.warehouseNo}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.addTime}, #{item.errCount}, #{item.msg}, #{item.uploadTime}, #{item.isUpload}, #{item.isDel}, #{item.teamName} )
